response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and other relevant technologies, with 13+ years in the field and a track record of building scalable systems. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, real-time APIs, and enterprise tooling aligns closely with the role's requirements. While he has some exposure to non-primary stacks (e.g., Dlang), his core competencies and problem-solving approach strongly suggest a high-fit candidate.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React
Proven track record in scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise tooling
Strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, DevOps) and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: Some roles involve non-primary technologies (e.g., Dlang), which may indicate less depth in required stacks
AI agent development is mentioned but lacks details on specific contributions or frameworks used

key_factors.factor: Core stack overlap (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest)
